label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6

extraction.one_line_summary: VINE Jay attacked from breakaway on final cat-1 climb, held off EVENEPOEL by 15 seconds while ROGLIC lost 1:37 with entire GC group sitting on his wheel
tactical_patterns: YATES Simon's counterattack to VINE failed, revealing lack of form on wet technical climbs early Vuelta.
EVENEPOEL's entire Quick-Step squad burnt out sheltering him from weather before final climb, PHILIPPE doing monster turn.
GC group tactically exploited ROGLIC's obligation to chase, sitting on his wheel knowing he had to close.
VINE bridged from breakaway remnants to solo leader PADAN then immediately attacked, not resting from effort.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: forced to lead chase alone with no team support, hemorrhaged 1:37 when rivals refused to contribute
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: took red jersey and 15 seconds on ROGLIC despite team exhausted by weather-protection duties pre-climb
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: lost 2:56, massive time loss suggests either poor wet-weather handling or hidden physical weakness
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: finished with EVENEPOEL for surprise podium position, showing unexpected punch on wet technical finish
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: attempted follow of VINE's attack quickly abandoned, clear signal of insufficient climbing legs
rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: bridged 42-second gap to breakaway leader then immediately attacked again, exceptional sustained climbing power
